entry.value: Exception occurred while performing 'Create' operation on identity 'null': Url: http://localhost:8080/identityiq-8.4/plugin/rest/eshiamEmployeePortalPlugin/createUser, Message: 500 : {"message":"Exception While Creating the User Please check server logs for more info.. \nColumn \u0027USER_ID\u0027 cannot be null","quickKey":"580578"}, HTTP Error Code: 500
